repos.name: OmniRoute

repos.name: iFixAi
repos.description: Catch your AI's mistakes and blind spots before your customers or regulators do. iFixAi runs 45 inspections, 32 graded core plus 13 extended for frontier risks like sabotage, sandbagging, and oversight evasion. It returns a letter grade in under 5 minutes. Industry and model agnostic.

repos.name: img2threejs
repos.description: Rebuild the object in a reference image as a code-only, procedural, quality-gated, animation-ready Three.js model. Token-efficient image-to-3D.
